layers.name: sim
layers.note: Elexon, NESO and Open-Meteo ingestion plus forward curves -- UK market specific

layers.name: simulation
layers.note: Settlement, renewal and customer-event mechanics -- generalizes to other liberalized energy markets

layers.name: saas
layers.note: Original Phase 0a business layer: pricing, billing, CLV, churn -- superseded in depth by company/, kept as the founding scaffold

layers.name: tools
layers.note: Site and report generation, data adapters -- no energy-domain logic

layers.name: background
layers.note: Autonomous orchestration daemons -- transferable to any agent-run business

layers.name: interface
layers.note: sim-to-saas data-contract seam, Phase 0a scaffold; contracts directory not yet populated

adapters.name: MarketDataPort
adapters.description: Structural Protocol adapters satisfy without inheritance. Current: Frozen2025Adapter wraps the live_market.py frozen 2025-12-31 cache.

adapters.name: CreditBureauPort
adapters.description: Epistemic-boundary adapter: company code only ever reads the noisy bureau read (passed / score_band), never the SIM ground-truth creditworthiness. Wired into the acquisition funnel (Phase QR).

adapters.name: sim_interface
adapters.description: The company-layer epistemic wall: exposes market data, meter reads, customer interactions -- never simulation internals such as churn params, forward-curve construction, or weather-engine outputs.

adapters.name: interface directory (sim-saas contracts)
adapters.description: Phase 0a original seam design for point-in-time market snapshots and forecast feeds. The contracts subdirectory is still empty -- saas/ has been overtaken in practice by the larger company/ layer's own sim_interface.py seam.

adapters.name: PSP adapter (payments)
adapters.description: No dedicated adapter yet -- payment behaviour is currently modelled directly, not via a swappable PSP boundary.

adapters.name: DCC adapter (smart metering)
adapters.boundary: Data Communications Company smart meter reads
adapters.description: No dedicated adapter yet -- smart-meter HH data is generated directly rather than read through a DCC-shaped boundary.

synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Per-customer behavioural trajectories: satisfaction history, income-stress, journey stage, switching propensity -- the population-anchored calibration inputs.
synthetic_data_catalogue.calibration: population-anchored against DESNZ and Ofgem benchmarks, Phases NS and PQ through PS

synthetic_data_catalogue.dataset: one JSON per household account under site/data/customers/
synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Full Customer 360 record per household or account: accounts, consumption, billing, timeline, reaction chain.
synthetic_data_catalogue.calibration: derived from the live sim run, no separate calibration

synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Full board dataset: portfolio, financial, trading, regulatory, and the portfolio-wide decision and event stream.
synthetic_data_catalogue.calibration: real run output, not a calibrated distribution

synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Market physics: settlement prices, system tightness (Short percent and NIV), gas NBP, negative-price-hour counts, ten years of history.
synthetic_data_catalogue.calibration: real Elexon and NESO settlement history, not synthetic

synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Daily and monthly UK temperature and heating-degree-days, ten years of history, chained through to price and system-tightness episodes.
Real per-invoice usage, rate and standing-charge breakdown for every bill issued across the run -- the source for the bill-equation and why-different waterfall on Customer 360.
synthetic_data_catalogue.calibration: derived from the live sim run

synthetic_data_catalogue.description: Churn, switching, complaints and arrears rates benchmarked against real-world population statistics -- the calibration artifact itself, not just an input.
